children.text: It shall be unlawful, if the purpose be to further the interests of the Palestine Liberation Organization or any of its constituent groups, any successor to any of those, or any agents thereof, on or after the effective date of this chapter—
to receive anything of value except informational material from the PLO or any of its constituent groups, any successor thereto, or any agents thereof;
to expend funds from the PLO or any of its constituent groups, any successor thereto, or any agents thereof; or

notwithstanding any provision of law to the contrary, to establish or maintain an office, headquarters, premises, or other facilities or establishments within the jurisdiction of the United States at the behest or direction of, or with funds provided by the Palestine Liberation Organization or any of its constituent groups, any successor to any of those, or any agents thereof.
For the effective date of this chapter, referred to in text, as being 90 days after

children.tail: , set out as an Effective Date note under

children.text: Delegation of Certain Functions and Authorities
Memorandum of President of the United States,
Memorandum for the Secretary of State
By the authority vested in me as President by the Constitution and the laws of the United States, including

children.tail: , United States Code, I hereby delegate to you the following functions and authorities:

children.text: • The function to make the specified reports to the Congress under
• The function and authority to waive the provisions of

children.text: You are authorized and directed to publish this memorandum in the Federal Register.
